queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the mitigating effect of having no checking account on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Investigating the contribution of higher requested credit amounts to increased credit risk and default likelihood.

queries.feature_definition: Loan purpose: purchase of a used car.
queries.question: Assessment of loan purpose for used car purchase as a determinant of decreased credit risk.
